suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define a shared modal baseline for accessibility and behavior (focus trap expectation, coordinated body scroll lock strategy, Escape handling precedence) so future modal work does not repeat known gaps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for settings-gear-modal flagged no focus trap and uncoordinated overflow lock across MEV/settings modal open-close handlers (src/server.ts modal functions).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update tokenlist architecture references to current names and model (`tokenlistSources` + `customTokenlists`) and remove stale references to `tokenlistTokens` / `customTokenlistUrl`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for multi-tokenlist-management found .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md still describes legacy single-list structures replaced in commit 9f9862d.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit procedure for 'already implemented / verification-only' assignments, including how to record commitId and test expectations when no code changes are needed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for autocomplete-disambiguation found worker performed verification-only work; handoff commit reference and test-step interpretation were ambiguous under current skill guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify color-governance rule: new UI colors must come from the documented palette or be added with WCAG contrast evidence before use.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for chain-mismatch-warnings flagged warning color #CC7A00 as outside documented palette and potentially below WCAG AA contrast on light backgrounds.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for testing critical client-side logic embedded in inline HTML/JS (e.g., extraction hooks or targeted integration assertions) to reduce manual-only verification gaps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for autocomplete-disambiguation noted no automated tests for dedup/disambiguation logic (`_needsDisambiguation`, source filtering) despite feature criticality.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill example handoff text closely matches an actual handoff.
Worker followed procedure with no deviations.
Create new .factory/library tokenlist architecture entry immediately.
